refined_caption: A rodent is visible in a hospital room. There is also a cat in the background.
complaint_description: I was shocked to see a rat in my hospital room, which is completely unacceptable. The presence of a cat in the room suggests that the rodent problem is severe. I am concerned about the cleanliness and safety of the hospital.
voice_text: There's a rat in my hospital room, it's disgusting. I also saw a cat, I don't know what's going on with pest control here.
